Subject:  Transcript of Q2 FY2025 Earnings Conference Call.  
 
Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
In continuation to our letters dated October 22, 2024 and November 08, 2024, please note that the 
Transcript of the Earnings Conference Call held on November 08, 2024, for the Unaudited Financial Results 
for the quarter and half year ended September 30, 2024, has been made available on the Company’s website 
www.lupin.com web link of which is https://www.lupin.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/lupin-transcript-
q2fy25-earnings-call.pdf. 
 
The above is for your information and dissemination. 
 
Thanking you, 
 
For LUPIN LIMITED 
 
 
 
 
AMIT KUMAR GUPTA
